raw_consumer_statement:
We started getting calls claiming they where American Express with no call back phone number or email address, but they where requesting payments over the phone. Also calling after hours late at night XXXX. We asked for more information and all they would say is time is running out for us? 

My CPA was also getting the calls and she had to block numerous numbers because they where harassing her for information and also calling late at night. The callers was a woman and man. 

My CPA stated to me that she thought it was fraud and block all transactions on the card and numbers calling harassing.
